# Office Display Manager — Access control

## Access control (ACLs)

<!-- BEGIN:generated:acls -->
| Table | Operation | Type | Admin override | Condition / script | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `x_804244_odm_slideshow` | create | record | yes | `answer = gs.isLoggedIn();` | Any authenticated user can create a slideshow |
| `x_804244_odm_slideshow` | read | record | yes | `sys_created_by=javascript:gs.getUserName()^ORassigned_account=javascript:gs.getUserID()` | Creator or assigned service account can read the slideshow |
| `x_804244_odm_slideshow` | write | record | yes | `sys_created_by=javascript:gs.getUserName()` | Only the creator can edit the slideshow |
| `x_804244_odm_slideshow` | delete | record | yes | `sys_created_by=javascript:gs.getUserName()` | Only the creator can delete the slideshow |
<!-- END:generated:acls -->
